matrix.ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
Invalid product codes must be rejected.
Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
Only valid state transitions are allowed.
Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Order created successfully via UI when order date, customer, and one line item are all provided

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API creates order successfully when request contains order date, customer ID, and one line item

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API creates order with multiple line items and alternate valid customer

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Blank order date, blank customer, and no line items shows inline validation errors in UI

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API rejects order creation request when customer_id is missing from payload

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Unauthenticated request to create order API endpoint is rejected with 401

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: No partial order record persists in database when required field validation fails

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Order with exactly one line item at minimum quantity boundary is accepted via API

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Order with valid product code PRD-1001 is accepted and order is created successfully via UI

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Order creation via API with valid product code PRD-2050 returns HTTP 201 and persists the order

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: UI displays inline validation error when sales user enters invalid product code INVALID-001 in line item

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: API rejects order creation when line item contains non-existent product code XYZ-9999 with HTTP 400

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Unauthenticated API request to create order with invalid product code returns HTTP 401 before validation

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Database does not persist any order or line item record when an invalid product code is submitted

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: ETL pipeline flags and quarantines order record containing invalid product code DEL-8888 from source feed

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: API rejects order when one of multiple line items contains invalid product code among valid ones

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Taxable product line item displays correct tax amount calculated at 8.25% on order creation via UI

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: API order creation returns calculated tax in response payload for taxable product

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: API order creation with alternate taxable product at different state tax rate returns correct tax

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Database stores correct tax_amount, tax_rate, and taxable flag after order creation with taxable product

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Non-taxable product on UI order form shows $0.00 tax and no tax rate label

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Unauthorised API request to create order with taxable product returns HTTP 401

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Non-taxable product in order results in zero tax amount via API

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Mixed order with taxable and non-taxable products calculates tax only on taxable line items

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order created via UI triggers downstream integration event visible in event log

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation via API publishes event to message broker with correct order payload

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Database order_events_outbox row is created with correct payload upon order insertion

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event with multiple line items carries complete transformed payload to downstream ETL

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Unauthorised API request to create order does not emit any integration event

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: ETL pipeline rejects malformed order event with missing customer_id and logs error

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order event payload includes all fields when order contains maximum 50 line items

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Downstream message broker outage causes order event to be retried and eventually delivered

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Valid state transition from Pending to Processing updates order status successfully via UI

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Valid state transition from Processing to Shipped succeeds via API

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Valid transition from Shipped to Delivered succeeds via API with alternate valid data

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Database records correct previous and new status after valid transition from Pending to Processing

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Invalid transition from Delivered to Processing is rejected via UI with inline error

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Unauthorised user without Operations role receives HTTP 403 when attempting status update via API

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Invalid backward transition from Shipped to Pending is rejected via API

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Transition to a non-existent status value is rejected via API as edge case

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Cancelled order allowed to transition to a valid target status (e.g., Archived) confirming rule applies only to Shipped

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Cancelled order status remains unchanged when user attempts to transition it to Shipped via UI

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API accepts valid status transition from Processing to Shipped for non-cancelled order ORD-50213

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Unauthenticated API request to transition cancelled order to Shipped returns HTTP 401

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API rejects PUT request to transition cancelled order ORD-50212 to Shipped with HTTP 422

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database constraint prevents direct UPDATE of cancelled order ORD-50214 status to Shipped

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: ETL pipeline flags and rejects cancelled-to-shipped transition record from upstream source

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Rapid consecutive API calls to ship a cancelled order are all rejected without race condition

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Order status change from Processing to Shipped is visible in Order Status Report and triggers email notification

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: API status update to Delivered propagates to reporting data and triggers notification event

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Alternative valid flow: status change from Pending to Processing generates report entry and in-app notification

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: ETL pipeline extracts status update and loads it into reporting data warehouse with correct dimensions

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: UI report does not display status update when invalid non-existent order filter is applied

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Status update with disabled notification configuration does not generate notification but still appears in reporting

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Unauthorised API request to update order status is rejected and does not generate reporting entry or notification

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Database records status update with audit trail visible to reporting queries after rapid consecutive status changes
